name: team_unit_dvoa range year_offset averages the dynamic column (executed-result parity)
description: Seed one player on team ZZZ with distinct 2024 (0.10) and 2025 (0.30) OFFENSE total_dvoa, then run team_unit_dvoa with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1,2]. The bespoke main_select_string_year_offset_range override must resolve the dynamic column (total_dvoa) and AVG it across the offset-expanded window (0.20), scoped to the team_unit discriminator -- the range path that previously emitted a dropped JOIN alias and invalid SQL.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT AVG(dvoa_team_unit_seasonlogs_index.total_dvoa) FROM dvoa_team_unit_seasonlogs_index WHERE dvoa_team_unit_seasonlogs_index.nfl_team = player.current_nfl_team AND dvoa_team_unit_seasonlogs_index.year IN (2024,2025) AND dvoa_team_unit_seasonlogs_index.team_unit = 'OFFENSE') AS "team_unit_dvoa_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" where player.primary_position IN ('ZZ') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, first_name, last_name, short_name, formatted_name, primary_position, secondary_position, date_of_birth, nfl_draft_year, current_nfl_team) VALUES ('TEST-DVOA-000901', 'Test', 'Dvoa', 'T.Dvoa', 'Test Dvoa', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020, 'ZZZ')
INSERT INTO dvoa_team_unit_seasonlogs_index (year, week, nfl_team, team_unit, timestamp, total_dvoa) VALUES (2024, 0, 'ZZZ', 'OFFENSE', 0, 0.10)
INSERT INTO dvoa_team_unit_seasonlogs_index (year, week, nfl_team, team_unit, timestamp, total_dvoa) VALUES (2025, 0, 'ZZZ', 'OFFENSE', 0, 0.30)
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT AVG(total_dvoa) AS team_unit_dvoa_0 FROM dvoa_team_unit_seasonlogs_index WHERE nfl_team = 'ZZZ' AND year IN (2024, 2025) AND team_unit = 'OFFENSE'
